plugin.name: PoisonTracker
plugin.author: BraeBear
plugin.purpose: Track Discworld poison ingredients, poisons, and coatings

muclient.script:
require "json"
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- DEFAULT DATA -- -- tPoisons = { [name] = { appearance="...", ingredients={...}, qty=N } } -- tIngredients = { [name] = { qty=N } } -- tCoatings = { [name] = { base="...", poison="...", qty=N } } -- base = name of the base ingredient (e.g. "pale brown goo") -- poison = name of the poison used (e.g. "bloat poison") --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
local DEFAULT_POISONS = { ["bloat poison"] = { appearance = "oily brown liquid", ingredients = {"blowfish poison sac"}, qty = 0 }, ["command removal poison"] = { appearance = "vivid chartreuse liquid", ingredients = {}, qty = 0 }, ["con poison"] = { appearance = "oily colourless liquid", ingredients = {"hemlock", "snake poison sac", "water"}, qty = 0 }, ["gas bomb"] = { appearance = "gas bomb", ingredients = {"clay", "bat guano", "Black Benedict's Batsup", "loose sugar", "sulphur powder", "candle wick"}, qty = 0 }, ["gp poison"] = { appearance = "shimmering orange liquid", ingredients = {"belladonna", "hemlock", "water"}, qty = 0 }, ["hallucination poison"] = { appearance = "brilliant blue liquid", ingredients = {"toad skin", "Angel's trumpet", "water"}, qty = 0 }, ["hp poison"] = { appearance = "sparkling purple syrup", ingredients = {"achorion mould", "vodka"}, qty = 0 }, ["misdirection poison"] = { appearance = "beige liquid", ingredients = {"skullcap"}, qty = 0 }, ["rage poison"] = { appearance = "pink creamy liquid", ingredients = {"Tyler Weed", "wolf heart", "lion duct", "water", "orange tablet"}, qty = 0 }, ["smoke bomb"] = { appearance = "smoke bomb", ingredients = {"clay", "bat guano", "Black Benedict's Batsup", "loose sugar", "sulphur powder", "candle wick"}, qty = 0 }, ["spell removal poison"] = { appearance = "shimmering blue liquid", ingredients = {"borage", "nightshade", "blue lotus"}, qty = 0 }, ["venom poison"] = { appearance = "dark red liquid", ingredients = {"poison gland (giant spider) OR poison sac (scorpion)"}, qty = 0 }, ["weedkiller poison"] = { appearance = "deep lime green liquid", ingredients = {"geranium", "solvent"}, qty = 0 }, -- ["poison name"] = { appearance = "colour liquid", ingredients = {"ingredient 1", "ingredient 2"}, qty = 0 }, }
local DEFAULT_INGREDIENTS = { ["blowfish poison sac"] = { qty = 0 }, ["hemlock"] = { qty = 0 }, ["snake poison sac"] = { qty = 0 }, ["water"] = { qty = 0 }, ["clay"] = { qty = 0 }, ["bat guano"] = { qty = 0 }, ["Black Benedict's Batsup"] = { qty = 0 }, ["loose sugar"] = { qty = 0 }, ["sulphur powder"] = { qty = 0 }, ["candle wick"] = { qty = 0 }, ["belladonna"] = { qty = 0 }, ["toad skin"] = { qty = 0 }, ["Angel's trumpet"] = { qty = 0 }, ["achorion mould"] = { qty = 0 }, ["vodka"] = { qty = 0 }, ["skullcap"] = { qty = 0 }, ["Tyler Weed"] = { qty = 0 }, ["wolf heart"] = { qty = 0 }, ["lion duct"] = { qty = 0 }, ["orange tablet"] = { qty = 0 }, ["borage"] = { qty = 0 }, ["nightshade"] = { qty = 0 }, ["blue lotus"] = { qty = 0 }, ["poison gland (giant spider)"] = { qty = 0 }, ["poison sac (scorpion)"] = { qty = 0 }, ["geranium"] = { qty = 0 }, ["solvent"] = { qty = 0 }, ["black coffee"] = { qty = 0 }, ["arcane moss"] = { qty = 0 }, ["pale brown goo"] = { qty = 0 }, -- ["ingredient name"] = { qty = 0 }, }
local DEFAULT_COATINGS = { -- Each coating = pale brown goo (base) + bloat poison + one additional poison ["con coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "con poison", qty = 0 }, ["hp coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "hp poison", qty = 0 }, ["rage coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "rage poison", qty = 0 }, ["spell removal coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "spell removal poison", qty = 0 }, ["gp coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "gp poison", qty = 0 }, ["venom coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "venom poison", qty = 0 }, ["bloat coating"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = nil, qty = 0 }, -- Add more coatings here: -- ["coating name"] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "poison name", qty = 0 }, }
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- STATE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- local tPoisons = {} local tIngredients = {} local tCoatings = {}
local function LoadState() local rawP = GetVariable("tPoisons") local rawI = GetVariable("tIngredients") local rawC = GetVariable("tCoatings")
if rawP ~= nil then local d = json.decode(rawP) tPoisons = (d and next(d) ~= nil) and d or DEFAULT_POISONS else tPoisons = DEFAULT_POISONS end
if rawI ~= nil then local d = json.decode(rawI) tIngredients = (d and next(d) ~= nil) and d or DEFAULT_INGREDIENTS else tIngredients = DEFAULT_INGREDIENTS end
if rawC ~= nil then local d = json.decode(rawC) tCoatings = (d and next(d) ~= nil) and d or DEFAULT_COATINGS else tCoatings = DEFAULT_COATINGS end end
LoadState()
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- HELPERS -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function FindItem(name) name = string.lower(name) if tIngredients[name] then return "ingredient", name end if tPoisons[name] then return "poison", name end if tCoatings[name] then return "coating", name end -- Partial match for k, _ in pairs(tIngredients) do if string.find(string.lower(k), name, 1, true) then return "ingredient", k end end for k, _ in pairs(tPoisons) do if string.find(string.lower(k), name, 1, true) then return "poison", k end end for k, _ in pairs(tCoatings) do if string.find(string.lower(k), name, 1, true) then return "coating", k end end return nil, nil end
local function SaveState() SetVariable("tPoisons", json.encode(tPoisons)) SetVariable("tIngredients", json.encode(tIngredients)) SetVariable("tCoatings", json.encode(tCoatings)) end
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- COMMAND FUNCTIONS -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function PoisonSet(name, qty) local itype, key = FindItem(string.lower(name)) if itype == "ingredient" then tIngredients[key].qty = qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Set ingredient '" .. key .. "' to " .. qty .. ".") elseif itype == "poison" then tPoisons[key].qty = qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Set poison '" .. key .. "' to " .. qty .. ".") elseif itype == "coating" then tCoatings[key].qty = qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Set coating '" .. key .. "' to " .. qty .. ".") else ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown item '" .. name .. "'. Use 'poison additem' to add it first.") end SaveState() update_window() end
function PoisonAdd(name, qty) local itype, key = FindItem(string.lower(name)) if itype == "ingredient" then tIngredients[key].qty = tIngredients[key].qty + qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added " .. qty .. " to ingredient '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tIngredients[key].qty) elseif itype == "poison" then tPoisons[key].qty = tPoisons[key].qty + qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added " .. qty .. " to poison '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tPoisons[key].qty) elseif itype == "coating" then tCoatings[key].qty = tCoatings[key].qty + qty ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added " .. qty .. " to coating '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tCoatings[key].qty) else ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown item '" .. name .. "'. Use 'poison additem' to add it first.") end SaveState() update_window() end
function PoisonUse(name, qty) local itype, key = FindItem(string.lower(name)) if itype == "ingredient" then tIngredients[key].qty = math.max(0, tIngredients[key].qty - qty) ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Used " .. qty .. " of ingredient '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tIngredients[key].qty) elseif itype == "poison" then tPoisons[key].qty = math.max(0, tPoisons[key].qty - qty) ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Used " .. qty .. " of poison '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tPoisons[key].qty) elseif itype == "coating" then tCoatings[key].qty = math.max(0, tCoatings[key].qty - qty) ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Used " .. qty .. " of coating '" .. key .. "'. Now: " .. tCoatings[key].qty) else ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown item '" .. name .. "'.") end SaveState() update_window() end
function PoisonReset() for k, _ in pairs(tIngredients) do tIngredients[k].qty = 0 end for k, _ in pairs(tPoisons) do tPoisons[k].qty = 0 end for k, _ in pairs(tCoatings) do tCoatings[k].qty = 0 end ColourNote("yellow", "", "All quantities reset to 0.") SaveState() update_window() end
function PoisonAddItem(itype, name) name = string.lower(name) if itype == "ingredient" then if tIngredients[name] then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Ingredient '" .. name .. "' already exists.") else tIngredients[name] = { qty = 0 } ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added ingredient '" .. name .. "'.") SaveState(); update_window() end elseif itype == "poison" then if tPoisons[name] then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Poison '" .. name .. "' already exists.") else tPoisons[name] = { appearance = "unknown", ingredients = {}, qty = 0 } ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added poison '" .. name .. "'.") SaveState(); update_window() end elseif itype == "coating" then if tCoatings[name] then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Coating '" .. name .. "' already exists.") else tCoatings[name] = { base = "pale brown goo", poison1 = "bloat poison", poison2 = "unknown", qty = 0 } ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Added coating '" .. name .. "'. Use 'coating setbase' and 'coating setpoison' to configure it.") SaveState(); update_window() end end end
function PoisonRemoveItem(name) name = string.lower(name) local itype, key = FindItem(name) if itype == "ingredient" then tIngredients[key] = nil ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Removed ingredient '" .. key .. "'.") elseif itype == "poison" then tPoisons[key] = nil ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Removed poison '" .. key .. "'.") elseif itype == "coating" then tCoatings[key] = nil ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Removed coating '" .. key .. "'.") else ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown item '" .. name .. "'.") return end SaveState(); update_window() end
function PoisonLink(ingredient, poison) ingredient = string.lower(ingredient) poison = string.lower(poison) if not tPoisons[poison] then ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown poison '" .. poison .. "'.") return end if not tIngredients[ingredient] then tIngredients[ingredient] = { qty = 0 } ColourNote("yellow", "", "Ingredient '" .. ingredient .. "' auto-added to ingredient list.") end for _, v in ipairs(tPoisons[poison].ingredients) do if v == ingredient then ColourNote("yellow", "", "'" .. ingredient .. "' is already linked to '" .. poison .. "'.") return end end table.insert(tPoisons[poison].ingredients, ingredient) ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Linked '" .. ingredient .. "' to '" .. poison .. "'.") SaveState(); update_window() end
function CoatingSetBase(coating, base) coating = string.lower(coating) base = string.lower(base) local _, key = FindItem(coating) if not key or not tCoatings[key] then ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown coating '" .. coating .. "'.") return end tCoatings[key].base = base -- Auto-add base to ingredients if not present if not tIngredients[base] then tIngredients[base] = { qty = 0 } ColourNote("yellow", "", "Ingredient '" .. base .. "' auto-added to ingredient list.") end ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Set base for '" .. key .. "' to '" .. base .. "'.") SaveState(); update_window() end
function CoatingSetPoison(coating, poison) coating = string.lower(coating) poison = string.lower(poison) local _, key = FindItem(coating) if not key or not tCoatings[key] then ColourNote("tomato", "", "Unknown coating '" .. coating .. "'.") return end tCoatings[key].poison2 = poison ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Set secondary poison for '" .. key .. "' to '" .. poison .. "'.") SaveState(); update_window() end
function PoisonShow() Note("") ColourNote("yellow", "", "=== POISON TRACKER ===")
-- POISONS Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "", "-- POISONS --") for pname, pdata in pairs(tPoisons) do local qtyCol = pdata.qty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" local appearance = pdata.appearance or "unknown appearance" ColourTell("white", "", " " .. pname) ColourTell("silver", "", " (" .. appearance .. ") qty: ") ColourNote(qtyCol, "", tostring(pdata.qty)) if #pdata.ingredients > 0 then for _, ing in ipairs(pdata.ingredients) do local iqty = tIngredients[ing] and tIngredients[ing].qty or 0 local iColor = iqty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" ColourTell("silver", "", " -> " .. ing .. ": ") ColourNote(iColor, "", tostring(iqty)) end else ColourNote("silver", "", " (no ingredients linked)") end end
-- COATINGS Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "", "-- COATINGS --") for cname, cdata in pairs(tCoatings) do local qtyCol = cdata.qty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" local base = cdata.base or "unknown" local p1 = cdata.poison1 or "unknown" local p2 = cdata.poison2 or "unknown" local bqty = tIngredients[base] and tIngredients[base].qty or 0 local p1qty = tPoisons[p1] and tPoisons[p1].qty or 0 local p2qty = tPoisons[p2] and tPoisons[p2].qty or 0 local bCol = bqty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" local p1Col = p1qty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" local p2Col = p2qty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" ColourTell("white", "", " " .. cname .. " ") ColourTell("silver", "", "qty: ") ColourNote(qtyCol, "", tostring(cdata.qty)) ColourTell("silver", "", " base: " .. base .. " qty: ") ColourNote(bCol, "", tostring(bqty)) ColourTell("silver", "", " poison1: " .. p1 .. " qty: ") ColourNote(p1Col, "", tostring(p1qty)) if cdata.poison2 then ColourTell("silver", "", " poison2: " .. p2 .. " qty: ") ColourNote(p2Col, "", tostring(p2qty)) end end
-- ALL INGREDIENTS Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "", "-- ALL INGREDIENTS --") for iname, idata in pairs(tIngredients) do local iColor = idata.qty > 0 and "palegreen" or "tomato" ColourTell("lightyellow", "", " " .. iname .. ": ") ColourNote(iColor, "", tostring(idata.qty)) end Note("") end
function PoisonHelp() Note("") ColourNote("yellow", "", "=== POISON TRACKER COMMANDS ===") ColourNote("cyan", "", " -- Quantities --") ColourNote("white", "", " poison set <item> <qty> - Set quantity directly") ColourNote("white", "", " poison add <item> <qty> - Add to current quantity") ColourNote("white", "", " poison use <item> <qty> - Subtract from current quantity") ColourNote("white", "", " poison reset - Reset ALL quantities to 0") ColourNote("cyan", "", " -- Display --") ColourNote("white", "", " poison show - Full inventory in main window") ColourNote("cyan", "", " -- Managing items --") ColourNote("white", "", " poison additem ingredient <n> - Add a new ingredient") ColourNote("white", "", " poison additem poison <n> - Add a new poison") ColourNote("white", "", " poison additem coating <n> - Add a new coating") ColourNote("white", "", " poison removeitem <n> - Remove any item") ColourNote("white", "", " poison link <ingredient> to <poison> - Link ingredient to a poison") ColourNote("cyan", "", " -- Coatings --") ColourNote("white", "", " coating setbase <coating> : <base> - Set the base ingredient") ColourNote("white", "", " coating setpoison <coating> : <poison> - Set the poison used") ColourNote("cyan", "", " -- Help --") ColourNote("white", "", " poison help - Show this help") Note("") end
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- MINIWINDOW (fixed height + scrollable) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- win = "PoisonTracker" .. GetPluginID()
local font_size = 9 local window_width = 300 local window_height = 300 -- fixed visible height (change this to taste) local line_spacing = 2 local window_inner_pad = 5 local scroll_bar_width = 12 local font_height = 0 local scroll_offset = 0 -- current scroll position in lines local thumb_dragging = false -- true while dragging the scroll thumb local thumb_drag_start_y = 0 -- mouse y when thumb drag began local thumb_drag_start_off = 0 -- scroll_offset when thumb drag began
local COL_BG = ColourNameToRGB("black") local COL_BORDER = ColourNameToRGB("silver") local COL_TITLE = ColourNameToRGB("white") local COL_HEADER = ColourNameToRGB("cyan") local COL_LABEL = ColourNameToRGB("silver") local COL_APPEARANCE = ColourNameToRGB("darkgray") local COL_GOOD = ColourNameToRGB("palegreen") local COL_BAD = ColourNameToRGB("tomato") local COL_INGREDIENT = ColourNameToRGB("lightyellow") local COL_COATING = ColourNameToRGB("wheat") local COL_SUBTEXT = ColourNameToRGB("darkgray") local COL_SCROLLBG = ColourNameToRGB("dimgray") local COL_SCROLLTHUMB= ColourNameToRGB("silver") local COL_SCROLLBTN = ColourNameToRGB("gray") local COL_SCROLLARROW= ColourNameToRGB("white") local COL_TAB_ACTIVE = ColourNameToRGB("darkslategray") local COL_TAB_INACTIVE = ColourNameToRGB("black") local COL_TAB_TEXT_ACTIVE = ColourNameToRGB("white") local COL_TAB_TEXT_INACTIVE = ColourNameToRGB("silver") local COL_TAB_BORDER = ColourNameToRGB("silver")
local active_tab = "poisons" -- "poisons", "coatings", "ingredients" local startx, starty = 0, 0 local resize_start_x = 0 -- mouse x when resize began local resize_start_y = 0 -- mouse y when resize began local resize_start_w = 0 -- window width when resize began local resize_start_h = 0 -- window height when resize began local MIN_WIDTH = 180 -- minimum window width local MIN_HEIGHT = 120 -- minimum window height local EDGE_THICKNESS = 6 -- pixels of edge/corner hotspot
-- Build rows for the active tab only local function BuildRows() local rows = {}
local function row(text, col, indent) indent = indent or 0 table.insert(rows, { text = text, col = col, indent = indent }) end
if active_tab == "poisons" then for pname, pdata in pairs(tPoisons) do local appearance = pdata.appearance or "unknown appearance" local qtyCol = pdata.qty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD row(pname .. " [" .. tostring(pdata.qty) .. "]", qtyCol, 0) row(appearance, COL_APPEARANCE, 2) if #pdata.ingredients == 0 then row("(no ingredients linked)", COL_LABEL, 4) else for _, ing in ipairs(pdata.ingredients) do local iqty = tIngredients[ing] and tIngredients[ing].qty or 0 local iCol = iqty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD row("+ " .. ing .. " [" .. tostring(iqty) .. "]", iCol, 4) end end row("", COL_BG, 0) -- spacer between poisons end
elseif active_tab == "coatings" then for cname, cdata in pairs(tCoatings) do local qtyCol = cdata.qty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD local base = cdata.base or "unknown" local p1 = cdata.poison1 or "unknown" local bqty = tIngredients[base] and tIngredients[base].qty or 0 local p1qty = tPoisons[p1] and tPoisons[p1].qty or 0 local bCol = bqty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD local p1Col = p1qty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD row(cname .. " [" .. tostring(cdata.qty) .. "]", COL_COATING, 0) row("base: " .. base .. " [" .. tostring(bqty) .. "]", bCol, 4) row("poison1: " .. p1 .. " [" .. tostring(p1qty) .. "]", p1Col, 4) if cdata.poison2 then local p2 = cdata.poison2 local p2qty = tPoisons[p2] and tPoisons[p2].qty or 0 local p2Col = p2qty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD row("poison2: " .. p2 .. " [" .. tostring(p2qty) .. "]", p2Col, 4) end row("", COL_BG, 0) -- spacer between coatings end
elseif active_tab == "ingredients" then for iname, idata in pairs(tIngredients) do local iCol = idata.qty > 0 and COL_GOOD or COL_BAD row(iname .. " [" .. tostring(idata.qty) .. "]", iCol, 0) end end
return rows end
function update_window() WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, window_width, window_height, miniwin.pos_center_all, 0, COL_BG) WindowFont(win, "f", "Consolas", font_size, false, false, false, false) font_height = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1)
local lh = font_height + line_spacing local btn_height = lh + 2 local title_height= lh + 2 -- Scrollable viewport: between title bar and bottom, minus two scroll buttons local tab_height_val = lh + 4 local viewport_top = window_inner_pad + title_height + tab_height_val local viewport_bottom = window_height - window_inner_pad local viewport_height = viewport_bottom - viewport_top local visible_lines = math.floor(viewport_height / lh)
local rows = BuildRows() local total_lines = #rows
-- Clamp scroll offset local max_scroll = math.max(0, total_lines - visible_lines) if scroll_offset > max_scroll then scroll_offset = max_scroll end if scroll_offset < 0 then scroll_offset = 0 end
-- Background & border WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, window_width, window_height, COL_BG) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, window_width, window_height, COL_BORDER)
-- Title bar local ty = window_inner_pad WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, ty, window_width, ty + title_height, ColourNameToRGB("darkslategray")) local title = "Poison Tracker" WindowText(win, "f", title, (window_width - WindowTextWidth(win, "f", title)) / 2, ty, 0, 0, COL_TITLE, false) WindowAddHotspot(win, "header", 0, ty, window_width - scroll_bar_width, ty + title_height, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "mouseup", "Drag to move", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "header", "dragmove", "dragrelease", 0)
-- ?? Tabs ????????????????????????????????????????????????? local tab_y = ty + title_height local tab_height = lh + 4 local tabs = { {"Poisons", "poisons"}, {"Coatings", "coatings"}, {"Ingredients", "ingredients"} } local tab_w = math.floor((window_width - scroll_bar_width) / #tabs) for i, tab in ipairs(tabs) do local label = tab[1] local key = tab[2] local tx = (i - 1) * tab_w local is_active = (active_tab == key) local bg = is_active and COL_TAB_ACTIVE or COL_TAB_INACTIVE local fg = is_active and COL_TAB_TEXT_ACTIVE or COL_TAB_TEXT_INACTIVE WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, tx, tab_y, tx + tab_w, tab_y + tab_height, bg) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, tx, tab_y, tx + tab_w, tab_y + tab_height, COL_TAB_BORDER) local tw = WindowTextWidth(win, "f", label) WindowText(win, "f", label, tx + (tab_w - tw) / 2, tab_y + 2, 0, 0, fg, false) WindowAddHotspot(win, "tab_" .. key, tx, tab_y, tx + tab_w, tab_y + tab_height, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "tab_click", "Switch to " .. label, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end
-- ?? Scroll bar ???????????????????????????????????????????? local sb_x = window_width - scroll_bar_width local sb_top = ty + title_height + (lh + 4) -- below title and tabs local sb_bot = window_height - window_inner_pad local sb_height= sb_bot - sb_top
-- Scroll bar track WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_x, sb_top, window_width, sb_bot, COL_SCROLLBG)
-- Up button (?) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_x, sb_top, window_width, sb_top + btn_height, COL_SCROLLBTN) WindowText(win, "f", "^", sb_x + 2, sb_top + 1, 0, 0, COL_SCROLLARROW, false) WindowAddHotspot(win, "scroll_up", sb_x, sb_top, window_width, sb_top + btn_height, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "scroll_click", "Scroll up (3 lines)", miniwin.cursor_arrow, 0)
-- Down button (?) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_x, sb_bot - btn_height, window_width, sb_bot, COL_SCROLLBTN) WindowText(win, "f", "v", sb_x + 2, sb_bot - btn_height + 1, 0, 0, COL_SCROLLARROW, false) WindowAddHotspot(win, "scroll_down", sb_x, sb_bot - btn_height, window_width, sb_bot, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "scroll_click", "Scroll down (3 lines)", miniwin.cursor_arrow, 0)
-- Scroll thumb if total_lines > visible_lines then local track_top = sb_top + btn_height local track_height = sb_height - btn_height * 2 local thumb_height = math.max(8, math.floor(track_height * visible_lines / total_lines)) local thumb_top = track_top + math.floor((track_height - thumb_height) * scroll_offset / max_scroll) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_x + 1, thumb_top, window_width - 1, thumb_top + thumb_height, COL_SCROLLTHUMB) -- Thumb drag hotspot WindowAddHotspot(win, "scroll_thumb", sb_x + 1, thumb_top, window_width - 1, thumb_top + thumb_height, "", "", "thumb_mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "mouseup", "Drag to scroll", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "scroll_thumb", "thumb_dragmove", "dragrelease", 0) end
-- ?? Clip and draw rows ???????????????????????????????????? local content_width = sb_x - window_inner_pad WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, viewport_top, sb_x, viewport_bottom, COL_BG)
for i = 1, visible_lines do local row_index = i + scroll_offset if row_index > total_lines then break end local r = rows[row_index] local ry = viewport_top + (i - 1) * lh local rx = window_inner_pad + r.indent * (font_height / 2) WindowText(win, "f", r.text, rx, ry, sb_x, ry + lh, r.col, false) end
-- ?? Resize hotspots ????????????????????????????????????? -- Right edge WindowAddHotspot(win, "resize_right", window_width - EDGE_THICKNESS, 0, window_width, window_height - EDGE_THICKNESS, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "mouseup", "Drag to resize width", miniwin.cursor_we, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "resize_right", "dragmove", "dragrelease", 0)
-- Bottom edge WindowAddHotspot(win, "resize_bottom", 0, window_height - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_width - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_height, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "mouseup", "Drag to resize height", miniwin.cursor_ns, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "resize_bottom", "dragmove", "dragrelease", 0)
-- Bottom-right corner (takes priority, drawn last) WindowAddHotspot(win, "resize_corner", window_width - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_height - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_width, window_height, "", "", "mousedown", "cancelmousedown", "mouseup", "Drag to resize", miniwin.cursor_nwse, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "resize_corner", "dragmove", "dragrelease", 0)
-- Draw a small corner grip indicator WindowLine(win, window_width - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_height - 2, window_width - 2, window_height - 2, COL_SCROLLBTN, miniwin.pen_solid + miniwin.pen_endcap_flat, 1) WindowLine(win, window_width - 2, window_height - EDGE_THICKNESS, window_width - 2, window_height - 2, COL_SCROLLBTN, miniwin.pen_solid + miniwin.pen_endcap_flat, 1)
WindowShow(win, true) Repaint() end
-- Helper: compute max scroll given current window state local function GetMaxScroll() local rows = BuildRows() local lh = font_height + line_spacing local title_height = lh + 2 local tab_height = lh + 4 local viewport_height = window_height - window_inner_pad - (window_inner_pad + title_height + tab_height) local visible_lines = math.floor(viewport_height / lh) return math.max(0, #rows - visible_lines), visible_lines end
-- Single click scrolls 3 lines at a time function scroll_click(flags, hotspot_id) local max_scroll, _ = GetMaxScroll() if hotspot_id == "scroll_up" then scroll_offset = math.max(0, scroll_offset - 3) elseif hotspot_id == "scroll_down" then scroll_offset = math.min(max_scroll, scroll_offset + 3) end update_window() end
function tab_click(flags, hotspot_id) local key = string.match(hotspot_id, "^tab_(.+)$") if key and key ~= active_tab then active_tab = key scroll_offset = 0 -- reset scroll when switching tabs update_window() end end
function thumb_mousedown(flags, hotspot_id) thumb_dragging = true thumb_drag_start_y = WindowInfo(win, 18) thumb_drag_start_off = scroll_offset end
-- Thumb drag: translate pixel movement to scroll offset function thumb_dragmove(flags, hotspot_id) if not thumb_dragging then return end local max_scroll, visible_lines = GetMaxScroll() if max_scroll == 0 then return end local rows = BuildRows() local total_lines = #rows local lh = font_height + line_spacing local title_height = lh + 2 local sb_top = window_inner_pad + title_height + 2 local sb_bot = window_height - window_inner_pad local btn_height = lh + 2 local track_height = (sb_bot - sb_top) - btn_height * 2 local thumb_height = math.max(8, math.floor(track_height * visible_lines / total_lines)) local travel = track_height - thumb_height if travel <= 0 then return end local dy = WindowInfo(win, 18) - thumb_drag_start_y local new_offset = thumb_drag_start_off + math.floor(dy * max_scroll / travel) scroll_offset = math.max(0, math.min(max_scroll, new_offset)) update_window() end
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- DRAG HANDLERS -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function mousedown(flags, hotspot_id) if hotspot_id == "header" then startx = WindowInfo(win, 14) starty = WindowInfo(win, 15) elseif hotspot_id == "resize_right" or hotspot_id == "resize_bottom" or hotspot_id == "resize_corner" then resize_start_x = WindowInfo(win, 17) resize_start_y = WindowInfo(win, 18) resize_start_w = window_width resize_start_h = window_height end end
function cancelmousedown(flags, hotspot_id) end
function mouseup(flags, hotspot_id) end
function dragmove(flags, hotspot_id) if hotspot_id == "header" then WindowPosition(win, WindowInfo(win, 17) - startx, WindowInfo(win, 18) - starty, 0, 2)
elseif hotspot_id == "resize_right" then local dx = WindowInfo(win, 17) - resize_start_x window_width = math.max(MIN_WIDTH, resize_start_w + dx) update_window()
elseif hotspot_id == "resize_bottom" then local dy = WindowInfo(win, 18) - resize_start_y window_height = math.max(MIN_HEIGHT, resize_start_h + dy) update_window()
elseif hotspot_id == "resize_corner" then local dx = WindowInfo(win, 17) - resize_start_x local dy = WindowInfo(win, 18) - resize_start_y window_width = math.max(MIN_WIDTH, resize_start_w + dx) window_height = math.max(MIN_HEIGHT, resize_start_h + dy) update_window() end end
function dragrelease(flags, hotspot_id) thumb_dragging = false -- Save size on release SetVariable("window_width", tostring(window_width)) SetVariable("window_height", tostring(window_height)) end
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- PLUGIN LIFECYCLE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall() update_window() end function OnPluginEnable() WindowShow(win, true) end function OnPluginDisable() WindowShow(win, false) end function OnPluginClose() WindowShow(win, false) end
function OnPluginSaveState() SaveState() SetVariable("window_pos_x", tostring(WindowInfo(win, 10))) SetVariable("window_pos_y", tostring(WindowInfo(win, 11))) SetVariable("window_width", tostring(window_width)) SetVariable("window_height", tostring(window_height)) SetVariable("active_tab", active_tab) end
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- STARTUP -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, window_width, 200, miniwin.pos_center_all, 0, COL_BG) WindowFont(win, "f", "Consolas", font_size, false, false, false, false) font_height = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1)
local saved_x = tonumber(GetVariable("window_pos_x")) local saved_y = tonumber(GetVariable("window_pos_y")) local saved_w = tonumber(GetVariable("window_width")) local saved_h = tonumber(GetVariable("window_height"))
if type(saved_w) == "number" and saved_w >= MIN_WIDTH then window_width = saved_w end if type(saved_h) == "number" and saved_h >= MIN_HEIGHT then window_height = saved_h end local saved_tab = GetVariable("active_tab") if saved_tab == "poisons" or saved_tab == "coatings" or saved_tab == "ingredients" then active_tab = saved_tab end
update_window()
if type(saved_x) == "number" and type(saved_y) == "number" then WindowPosition(win, saved_x, saved_y, 0, 2) end
ColourNote("palegreen", "", "Poison Tracker loaded. Type 'poison help' for commands.")
